mapper.insert: insert into student_course(id, student_id, course_id, teacher_id, teacher_name, status, score, teaching_class_id, academic_year_id) values (#{id}, #{student_id}, #{course_id}, #{teacher_id}, #{teacher_name}, #{status}, #{score}, #{teaching_class_id}, #{academic_year_id})
mapper.update: update student_course set score = #{score} where student_id = #{student_id} and course_id = #{course_id}
mapper.delete: delete from student_course where student_id = #{student_id} and course_id = #{course_id}
mapper.select: select * from student_course where student_id = #{student_id} and course_id = #{course_id}
